Sneak peek...

You, were a well known fighter across Sword Fight On The Heights. It was a regular day for you in SFOTH, sparring and battling different people across the map, as well as meeting them and becoming allies and earning respect. You were quite the enigma, defeating opponents that were in your way, teaching others techniques and ways to win a battle or duel.

It kept going like that until something unexpected was coming your way... You were exploring the map, crossing a bridge with spinning contraptions for training and practice on different terrain for any different situations... As soon as you go back onto the main platform a large ring of fire in the inside the platform near the edge, making it seem like an arena. Stepping onto it and looking back at the spinning obstacle. You feel an intimidating presence behind you... You look
